name: goal-shaper
description: Shape fuzzy requests into best-practice Codex Goal mode packages.

interface.shortDescription: Turn rough requests into verified Codex goals
interface.longDescription: Use Goal Shaper to decide whether a task belongs in Codex Goal mode, interview for missing outcome and verification details, and produce a copyable /goal package with evidence, assumptions, safety boundaries, and durable guidance candidates.
defaultPrompt: Shape this rough request into a Codex /goal.
Turn my task into a verified Goal mode package.
